name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

settings.name: (Required) User
settings.description: Required. Username for the Oracle connection.

settings.name: (Required) Password
settings.description: Required. Password for the Oracle connection.

settings.name: (Connection Method: Host/Port/Service) Host
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with ORACLE_PORT and ORACLE_SERVICE_NAME. Mutually exclusive with TNS Alias and Connection String methods.

settings.name: (Connection Method: Host/Port/Service) Port
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with ORACLE_HOST and ORACLE_SERVICE_NAME.

settings.name: (Connection Method: Host/Port/Service) Service Name
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with ORACLE_HOST and ORACLE_PORT.

settings.name: (Connection Method: TNS) TNS Alias
settings.description: For TNS connection. Use with ORACLE_TNS_ADMIN. Mutually exclusive with Host/Port/Service and Connection String methods.

settings.name: (Connection Method: TNS) TNS Admin
settings.description: For TNS connection. Path to directory containing tnsnames.ora. Use with ORACLE_TNS_ALIAS.

settings.name: (Connection Method: Direct) Connection String
settings.description: For Direct Connection String (EZConnect). Mutually exclusive with Host/Port/Service and TNS Alias methods.

settings.name: (Optional) Wallet Location
settings.description: Optional. Path to Wallet directory. May be required for secure connections.

settings.name: (Optional) Use OCI
settings.description: Optional. Set to 'true' to use the OCI (thick client) driver, which is required for some connection types like Wallet authentication.
